posts.author: zk643 (zk643)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, is there a way to copy user permissions from AD to the account permissions on monday?

Ie John Smith is an Admin in AD, on monday account creation set him as Admin

Currently our workflow is this:

\1. John Smith is an Admin in AD
2. monday admin Logs onto monday > Administration > Invite John Smith
3. When John Smith accepts, monday admin goes to Administration > Users > sets John Smith account to Admin

\1. Jane Doe is a User in AD
2. monday admin Logs onto monday > Administration > Invite Jane Doe
3. When Jane Doe accepts, monday admin goes to Administration > Users > sets Jane Doe account to Member

Doing this manually for hundreds of employees is tedious. Is there any way to batch copy permissons to monday?

Thank you
